# Gourmet Grazin'

> Gourmet Grazin' is Kentucky's top-rated charcuterie catering service, with a perfect 5.0-star rating from 12 reviews. They offer luxury mobile charcuterie carts, stunning grazing tables, handcrafted boards, individual cups and boxes, and hands-on charcuterie classes for weddings, corporate events, baby showers, bridal showers, and private parties across Kentucky.

## Why Choose Gourmet Grazin'

- Perfect 5.0-star rating across all reviews
- Kentucky's only white-glove mobile charcuterie cart service
- Woman-owned, husband-and-wife operated local business
- Full setup, styling, and breakdown included with every booking
- Custom dietary accommodations: vegetarian, gluten-free, nut-free, dairy-free
- Serves events from 2 to 200+ guests
- All ingredients are premium artisan quality — real imported cheeses, cured meats, seasonal fruits
- Online ordering through Shopify for boards, cups, and boxes

## Services and Pricing

### Luxury Mobile Cart Experiences ($250-$400+)
The signature service. A custom-built charcuterie cart arrives fully stocked and served tableside by the Gourmet Grazin' team. Options include:
- **Gourmet Grazin' Cart** ($400+) — Artisan cheeses, premium cured meats, seasonal fruits, gourmet crackers. Most popular option.
- **Personalized Favor Bar** ($400+) — Guests curate their own take-home creation
- **Sweet & Savory Social** ($400+) — Mix of cheeses, meats, chocolates, candied nuts
- **The Mocktail Bar** ($250+) — Non-alcoholic cocktails, perfect for baby showers
- **The Lemonade Atelier** ($250+) — Fresh-pressed signature lemonade infusions
- **The Cocoa & Cider Bar** ($350+) — Hot cocoa and spiced cider for fall/winter events
- **The Morning Soirée** ($400+) — Brunch cart with quiches, pastries, yogurt parfaits
- **The Confectionery Cart** ($400+) — Dessert cart with truffles, macarons, tarts
- **The Chocolate Fondue Bar** ($400+) — Interactive chocolate fondue experience
Serves 25-150+ guests. Booking: https://www.gourmetgrazinky.com/luxury-cart-experiences

### Grazing Tables (custom pricing)
Stunning tablescapes for larger gatherings of 20-200+ guests. Full setup and breakdown included. Ideal for weddings, corporate events, holiday parties. Booking: https://www.gourmetgrazinky.com/grazing-tables

### Charcuterie Boards ($65-$210)
Handcrafted boards available in 4 sizes:
- Small (2-5 people): $65
- Medium (5-10 people): $120
- Large (10-15 people): $175
- X-Large (15-20+ people): $210

Styles: Classic, Sweet-Salty, Brunch, Veggie, Fruit, Game Day, Birthday & Anniversary, Easter, Thanksgiving, Christmas, Halloween, Custom Message. All made fresh to order (24-48 hour preparation). Order: https://www.gourmetgrazinky.com/shop

### Charcuterie Cups ($8/cup, minimum 15)
Grab-and-go individual portions. Options: Classic Cup, Sweet Tooth Cup, Yogurt Cups, Custom/Seasonal Cup. Order: https://www.gourmetgrazinky.com/shop

### Charcuterie Boxes ($10/box, minimum 6)
Shareable curated boxes. Options: Classic Box, Sweet Tooth Box, Brunch Box, Custom Message Box. Order: https://www.gourmetgrazinky.com/shop

### Charcuterie Classes ($450-$600)
Hands-on board-building classes. All ingredients and supplies included.
- Small Group (6-10 people): $450
- Large Group (10-20 people): $600
- Duration: ~90 minutes
Perfect for team building, girls' night, bridal parties, corporate events. Booking: https://www.gourmetgrazinky.com/charcuterie-classes

## Location and Service Area

Based in Kentucky, United States. Serves events throughout the entire state of Kentucky. Travel fees may apply for venues beyond standard service area.

## Booking Information

- Recommended lead time: 1-2 months for most events, earlier for weddings and peak season (spring through fall)
- Team arrives 30-60 minutes before events for setup
- Full setup, styling, and breakdown included
- Response time: within 24 hours of inquiry
- Payment: Credit card, debit card
- Book online: https://www.gourmetgrazinky.com/luxury-cart-experiences#book-cart

## Customer Reviews

All reviews are 5 stars. Customers frequently mention:
- "Perfect Pinterest find for any party"
- "Beautiful, elegant, and truly impressive"
- "Exceeded all expectations"
- "The setup and service was so seamless and professional"
- "Everyone was raving about it"
- "Such a fun and unique experience"

## Contact and Social Media

- Website: https://www.gourmetgrazinky.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gourmetgrazingky/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61578270886953
- Online Shop: https://www.gourmetgrazinky.com/shop

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What areas does Gourmet Grazin' serve?
A: They serve events throughout Kentucky. Travel fees may apply for distant venues.

Q: How far in advance should I book?
A: 1-2 months for most events. For weddings and peak season, book even earlier.

Q: How many guests can the mobile cart serve?
A: 25-150+ guests depending on the package. For smaller groups, charcuterie boards are recommended.

Q: Can they accommodate dietary restrictions?
A: Yes — vegetarian, gluten-free, nut-free, and dairy-free options are available.

Q: What's included in charcuterie classes?
A: All supplies, ingredients, a personal cutting board, step-by-step instruction, and tastings.

Q: Do they handle setup and cleanup?
A: Yes, full setup, styling, and breakdown are included with every booking.
